subcodes.first_line: The servant beareth witness unto that which God Himself hath testified: that there is none other God but Him, Who hath ever been sanctified beyond all mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الخادم علی ما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن الذکر و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
